violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in fan blades have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025
Inspector observed a heavy accumulation of trash, equipment, and other debris around the refuse area. Area to be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris (especially in the storage areas and walk-in cooler). The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025
